input.content:
# C Project Build Configuration
# Standard targets for building, testing, and maintaining the project

# Compiler and flags
CC := gcc
CFLAGS := -Wall -Wextra -Werror -std=c99 -O2
CFLAGS_DEBUG := -Wall -Wextra -std=c99 -g -O0
LDFLAGS := -lm

# Directories
SRC_DIR := src
BUILD_DIR := build
OBJ_DIR := $(BUILD_DIR)/obj
BIN_DIR := $(BUILD_DIR)/bin
DIST_DIR := $(BUILD_DIR)/dist

# Files
SOURCES := $(wildcard $(SRC_DIR)/*.c)
OBJECTS := $(SOURCES:$(SRC_DIR)/%.c=$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o)
TARGET := $(BIN_DIR)/app
TARGET_DEBUG := $(BIN_DIR)/app-debug

# Default target
.PHONY: all
all: release

# ============================================================================
# STANDARD BUILD TARGETS
# ============================================================================

# Release build (optimized)
.PHONY: release
release: CFLAGS := $(CFLAGS)
release: $(TARGET)

# Debug build (with debugging symbols)
.PHONY: debug
debug: CFLAGS := $(CFLAGS_DEBUG)
debug: $(TARGET_DEBUG)

# Build the executable
$(TARGET): $(OBJECTS) | $(BIN_DIR)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) $(OBJECTS) -o $@ $(LDFLAGS)
	@echo "✓ Release build complete: $@"

$(TARGET_DEBUG): $(OBJECTS) | $(BIN_DIR)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS_DEBUG) $(OBJECTS) -o $@ $(LDFLAGS)
	@echo "✓ Debug build complete: $@"

# Compile source files to object files
$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: $(SRC_DIR)/%.c | $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -o $@
	@echo "  Compiled: $<"

# Create necessary directories
$(BUILD_DIR) $(OBJ_DIR) $(BIN_DIR) $(DIST_DIR):
	mkdir -p $@

# ============================================================================
# UTILITY TARGETS
# ============================================================================

# Clean build artifacts
.PHONY: clean
clean:
	@rm -rf $(BUILD_DIR)
	@echo "✓ Build artifacts cleaned"

# Rebuild from scratch
.PHONY: rebuild
rebuild: clean all

# Install the executable (to /usr/local/bin by default)
.PHONY: install
install: $(TARGET)
	install -d $(DESTDIR)/usr/local/bin
	install -m 755 $(TARGET) $(DESTDIR)/usr/local/bin/app
	@echo "✓ Installation complete"

# Uninstall the executable
.PHONY: uninstall
uninstall:
	rm -f $(DESTDIR)/usr/local/bin/app
	@echo "✓ Uninstallation complete"

# Run the application
.PHONY: run
run: $(TARGET)
	@echo "Running application..."
	@$(TARGET)

# Run the debug version
.PHONY: run-debug
run-debug: $(TARGET_DEBUG)
	@echo "Running debug build..."
	@$(TARGET_DEBUG)

# Display build information
.PHONY: info
info:
	@echo "Build Configuration:"
	@echo "  CC: $(CC)"
	@echo "  CFLAGS: $(CFLAGS)"
	@echo "  LDFLAGS: $(LDFLAGS)"
	@echo "  Sources: $(SOURCES)"
	@echo "  Target: $(TARGET)"
	@echo ""
	@echo "Available targets:"
	@echo "  make                  - Build release version (default)"
	@echo "  make release          - Build optimized release"
	@echo "  make debug            - Build with debug symbols"
	@echo "  make rebuild          - Clean and build"
	@echo "  make run              - Build and run"
	@echo "  make run-debug        - Build debug and run"
	@echo "  make install          - Install to /usr/local/bin"
	@echo "  make uninstall        - Remove from /usr/local/bin"
	@echo "  make clean            - Remove build artifacts"
	@echo "  make info             - Show this help"

# Help target
.PHONY: help
help: info

# Prevent built-in rules from interfering
.SUFFIXES:

# Mark phony targets
.SILENT: info help
